case_title: WILLIAM W. STANDER VS. PIE DIGITAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANDER, WILLIAM W. AS TO DEFENDANT PIE DIGITAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION
